articles.author: Charlie Wright
articles.title: The Opener: AL Wins ASG, Bellinger, Caminero - MLB Trade Rumors
articles.description: The American League secured a shutout victory in the All-Star game. Cody Bellinger was named MVP.
articles.content: Dodgers lefty Justin Wrobleski made a bit of history last night. He became the first pitcher since Pedro Martinez in 1999 to have at least five strikeouts in the All-Star game (h/t Sarah Langs of MLB… [+2158 chars]
